message:
fix(fcp-host,roam): report self-check runtime failures instead of silently swallowing them

fcp-host:
- Replace .ok() in registry self_check with proper error-to-failure-report
  conversion via runtime_self_check_failure_report(). Previously, if a
  connector's self_check() returned Err, the host silently reported None
  (no health data), masking runtime failures from operators.
- Add test verifying the failure report marks runtime errors as Failed
  with reason_code "self_check_runtime"

supervisor:
- Replace map_or(true, |start| ...) with is_none_or(|start| ...) for
  idiomatic Option filtering in restart window calculation

roam:
- Merge two Err() match arms with | pattern per clippy suggestion

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -447,7 +447,7 @@ impl RestartTracker {
         u32::try_from(
             self.history
                 .iter()
-                .filter(|event| window_start.map_or(true, |start| event.timestamp >= start))
+                .filter(|event| window_start.is_none_or(|start| event.timestamp >= start))
                 .count(),
         )
         .unwrap_or(u32::MAX)
